name: Dreamtalia
description:
A dream creature has whisked Italy away into his perfect paradise to stay forever. However if he does, he will die in the dream world. It is up to Germany and the rest of the axis and allies to go into Italy's mind and save him from his own utopia, along with all of the other prisoners trapped in comas by the creature.

Germany, Japan, America, France, England, Russia, China and Canada were all wondering around trying to look for any clues that could find Italy to wake him up and fight the

Faucherêve....
creator: Liam_lively
